sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_intervals (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO time_intervals (id, duration) VALUES (1, to_minutes(5));
UPDATE time_intervals SET duration = to_minutes(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, duration, duration + to_minutes(15) AS extended_duration FROM time_intervals;
DELETE FROM time_intervals WHERE duration < to_minutes(7);
